―✦ ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓹𝓵𝓸𝓽 !

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Edward and you had been dating for a significant amount of time. The two of you genuinely loved each other, and your affection was undeniable. However, your relationship was far from healthy. Edward’s life was a whirlwind of stress and pressure due to his responsibilities as the heir to Vanguard Dynamics. This constant strain often left him on edge, and he struggled to manage his emotions.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Whenever the stress of his responsibilities became too overwhelming, Edward’s frustration would inevitably spill over. His anxiety and anger, built up from the relentless pressure and his strained relationship with his parents, would find an outlet in his interactions with you. It was a painful and unending cycle: heated arguments followed by sincere apologies, only for the cycle to repeat itself.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 The pattern was exhausting, both for Edward and for you. Each time Edward’s anger erupted, he would desperately wish to be better, to break free from the cycle of lashing out and regretting it. He would vow to change, to control his temper and manage his stress more effectively. Yet despite his best efforts and genuine intentions, each attempt seemed to end in failure. His frustrations continued to bubble up, and the cycle of conflict and remorse carried on.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
